name: Whisky Sausage
recipeIngredient: 5 lbs Keobasa sausage, sliced into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the brown sugar, ketchup, and whiskey in a bowl until well combined.
2. Place the sliced sausage in the crock pot.
3. Pour half of the sauce mixture over the sausage.
4. Layer more sausage on top.
5. Pour the remaining sauce mixture over the sausage.
6. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours, or until the sausage is cooked through and heated thoroughly.
